text: Certified payroll information shall be submitted through our web based platform at Oryxcompliance.com .  If you do not already have an Oryx Compliance log in account please contact Oryx Compliance ('Oryx') via email to set up an account.  Oryx will provide and email with a link to create a username and password.  Using your Oryx Compliance account, you will be able to submit weekly certified payroll information.  Certified payroll documents and supporting documentation will be generated through the Oryx website. Certified payrolls can be e-signed .  If you choose not to esign, certified payroll information should be signed by the appropriate individuals with originals mailed to Oryx Compliance weekly.
